raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet tas KUNGS ne
gribbeja Juhdu famaitaht fawa
Kalpa Dahwida deht/ itt ká
wiꞥſch tam bij tazzijs/ ka tas
wiꞥſnam allachin gribbetu kah-
du Gaischumu Doht starp wiꞥ-
na Behrneem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Wiꞥſna Laiká atkahpe tee
Fedomiteri no Juhda Waldi-
fchanag/ un darrija pahr few wee-
nu kehnizu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Jo Jerams bija us Zát-
rn gabjts/ ar wiﬀeem fatweem
Ratteem/ un Nakti zehlees/ un
tohs Eedomiterus/ kas apkahrt
wiꞥſnu bija/ kavis/ lihds ar wiﬀ-
feem Rattu Wirfneefeem/ un tee
Landis behdse favôs Dihwoftôs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tapehz atkahpe tee Eedo-
mitert no Juhda/ lihds schodeen.
Tai Laiká atkahpe arri Libna.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un kas wehl no Jorama
Leetahn atteek/ un wiﬀs/ ko
wiꞥſch irr darrijs/ tas irr rak-
stihts to Kehnizu no Juhda Lai-
ku-Grahmatâ.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 24,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Jorams afsmigge ar
faweem Tehweem/ un tappe pee
faweem Tehweem aprakts Dah-
wida Piili/ un Akasjus wiꞥſna
Dehls tappe par Kehutzu wiꞥſna
Weetá.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 25,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Diwiipadefinitá Gaddá
Jorama Akaba Dehla/ta Israêta
Kehniza/ fahze Akasjus Jorama
Dehls waldiht pahr Juhdu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 26,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Dividefinits un divi
Gaddus bija Akasjus wezz/ kad
wiꞥſch par Kehnizu tappe/ un
waldtja weenu Gaddu Jerusale-
mê/ un wiꞥſna Mahteí bija Ata-
tija Wahrdá/ Amrusta Israêta
kehniza Meita.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 27,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un wiꞥſch staigaja us to
Zettu ta Namma Akaba/ un
darrija/ kas tam KUNGSAM ne
patikke/ ittin ka Akaba Nams/
jo wiꞥſch bija Akaba Namnam
par Snohtu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 28,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un wiꞥſch gabje ar Jo-
ramu Akaba Dehlu Kaxrá/ Rah-
motá eeksch Gileadas/ prett Asa-
elu to Sihrezu Kehnizu/ bet tee
Sihrezi kave Joramu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 29,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad greesehs tas Kehniisch
Jorams atpakat/ ka tas Jesree-
lá liktohs dseedinateeß no teem
Sitteneem/ ko tee Sihrezi tam
bij sittufchi/ eeksch Rahmotas/
kad tas prett Asaêlu to Sihrezu
Kehnizu bij karrojs. Un Akast-
jus Jorama Dehts tas Kehniisch
no Juhda nonabze/ Joramu A-
kaba Dehlu Jesreêlá apraudsiht/
jo wiꞥſch bija neweffels.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
